items.title: Apple is using AI to fix Safari’s extension problem
items.summary: Apple is trying to solve one of Safari's biggest weaknesses with AI. Safari has long lacked the robust library of extensions that its rivals have, mainly due to the stringent de...

items.title: OpenAI Confidentially Files for IPO on the Heels of SpaceX and Anthropic
items.summary: The ChatGPT-maker announced it has filed paperwork to go public, just a week after rival Anthropic took the same step.
